_comment: HarnessV2 discovery stage hook manifest (discovery-improvement-plan M3.1). install pipeline reads this and materializes .claude/hooks/discovery/<script>.py + a hooks section in .claude/settings.json. Each entry maps a Claude Code hook event to one of the Python scripts shipped alongside this file. Reuses intake's record_context_read.py via the shared intake hook manifest — no duplicate hook needed for project-context reads.

hooks.purpose: Block discovery-brief.md / discovery-brief.contract.yaml writes outside the discovery stage worktree (enforces stage-worktree-required HARD-GATE).
Block discovery-brief.md writes on brownfield missions unless the contract carries gitnexus_* evidence in existing_solutions[] or a gitnexus_unavailable/gitnexus_stale entry in degradations[].
Block harness contract/gate advance when discovery contract.dependency_trigger.required=true but no dependency-validity-reviewer PASS verdict is recorded yet.
Block `harness mission stage complete discovery` unless the latest discovery__*.json gate-report has status=PASS (prevents silent gate bypass).
Block `harness mission stage start <next>` unless approvals.json carries either a discovery_skip record or a discovery_confirmation approved checkpoint for the mission.
Append a structured trace event whenever the AI calls a gitnexus MCP tool, so retrospective + reviewer can audit brownfield missions actually exercised gitnexus.
